message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **Send file to inbox**

actor User
participant REST
participant "Lookup Service" as LS
participant "VFS Service" as VFS
participant "Storage Service" as SS
participant S3

User -> LS : get User2 inbox info 🔑(login/password)
User <-- LS : User2 🔑**public key** and **/inbox** access creds
User -> SS : encrypt and save file to user's inbox location
SS -> S3 : persistence
SS <-- S3 : success
User <-- SS : success

@enduml
```
